sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115398" key="yedno/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψεδνότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n115398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">baldness,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
